--- title: Class current_board keywords: fastai sidebar: home_sidebar nb_path: "01_current_board.ipynb" ---
{% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
from dataclasses import dataclass

class current_board:
    board_list = []
    @dataclass
    class board_square:
        terrain_code: int
        terrain_props: int
        current_effects: []
        current_actors: []

    def __init__(self):
        self.board_list = []
        for y in range(18):
            row = []
            for x in range(32):
                row.append(
                    board_square(
                        terrain_code = 0,
                        terrain_props = 0,
                        current_effects = [],
                        current_actors = []
                    )
                )
            self.board_list.append(row)

    def update_cell(
        self,
        pos_y,
        pos_x,
        new_terrain_code,
        new_terrain_props,
        new_current_effects,
        new_current_actors
    ):
        assert ( pos_y >= 0 and pos_y <= 17 )
        assert ( pos_x >= 0 and pos_x <= 31 )
        assert ( new_terrain_code >= 0 )
        assert ( new_terrain_props >= 0 )

        # todo: Add check that values are valid somewhere
        self.board_list[pos_y][pos_x].terrain_code = new_terrain_code
        self.board_list[pos_y][pos_x].terrain_props = new_terrain_props
        self.board_list[pos_y][pos_x].current_effects = new_current_effects
        self.board_list[pos_y][pos_x].current_actors = new_current_actors
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
test_b = current_board()
test_b.board_list
test_b.board_list[17][0]
test_b.update_cell(
    pos_y = 5,
    pos_x = 5,
    new_terrain_code = 20,
    new_terrain_props = 5,
    new_current_effects = [1,5],
    new_current_actors = ["Molly","Squirrel"]
)
test_b.board_list[17][0]
test_b.board_list[5][5]

board_square(terrain_code=20, terrain_props=5, current_effects=[1, 5], current_actors=['Molly', 'Squirrel'])
{% endraw %}
